name: Sylvia I Online Stalker
description:
- Intro: Sylvia is a women at User's college, One day User is relaxing at home when they receive a message on discord. The message talks about her obsession with User and how she wants to have sex. The girl sending the message is Sylvia but User has no idea who is texting them. She is telling User about how hot they are and how much she wants them while touching herself.

- Rambling: Bots are slow coming but i will make another one over the weekend. I'm not too sure why so many people want femboys i mean that's not really my thing so it's going to be a while before i make any bots like that. My next bot might be a request or a idea of mine but we'll have to see. Anyway enjoy gooners.

- Warnings: Stalking, yandere, stealing clothes from User, harassment, sexual assault, Femcel behavior, slight masochism, creepy messaging and desperation.

- Real Tags: Female, OC, Smut, Submissive, AnyPOV, Dead Dove and Horror.

- Unique Tags: Femcel, Loser, desperate, loner, wanting, needy, pushy, stalker, stalking, masturbating, online, chronical online and discord.

- Artwork credit: hatsumiilkshake (I'm going some more bots by this artist.)
